testcase.name: Reporte Avería - Foto Opcional › [P0-E2E-005] should show photo preview after upload

failure.message: reporte-averia-validaciones.spec.ts:158:7 [P0-E2E-005] should show photo preview after upload

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › story-2.2\reporte-averia-validaciones.spec.ts:158:7 › Reporte Avería - Foto Opcional › [P0-E2E-005] should show photo preview after upload
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('img[alt="Preview"]') Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator('img[alt="Preview"]')
170 | // Then: Preview visible (alt="Preview" with capital P) 171 | const preview = page.locator('img[alt="Preview"]'); > 172 | await expect(preview).toBeVisible(); | ^ 173 | }); 174 | }); 175 | at C:\Users\ambso\dev\gmao-hiansa\tests\e2e\story-2.2\reporte-averia-validaciones.spec.ts:172:27
